name: Doo Daruwo
overview: Doo Daruwo was one of the longest running Sri Lankan television serials, airing from 1990 to 1995. It was one of the most popular shows of its time and drew in 8 million viewers at its peak.

trailers.title: Doo Daruwo (දූ දරුවෝ) EP 01 | Sinhala Teledrama|  (1 Hour Episode) | Longest-running Teledrama in 🇱🇰
